mapper.select: SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, e.employee_tier AS authorTier, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.view_count AS viewCount, ka.created_at AS createdAt, true AS bookmarked FROM knowledge_bookmark kb JOIN knowledge_article ka ON kb.article_id = ka.article_id JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE kb.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND ka.is_deleted = false ORDER BY kb.created_at DESC
